title: Twilight · Chapter 13
description: 真人原声 · 第十三章

sentences.english: I've had to fight our kind before.
sentences.chinese: 我曾经和同类战斗过
sentences.shadowing: I've had to fight‿our KIND BEFORE. ↘

sentences.english: - They're not easy to kill. - But not impossible.
sentences.chinese: -要杀死他们不简单－但不是不可能的
sentences.shadowing: - They're not‿easy to kill. - But NOT IMPOSSIBLE. ↘

sentences.english: We'll tear them apart and burn the pieces.
sentences.chinese: 我们把他们撕成碎片烧成灰
sentences.shadowing: We'll tear them‿apart‿and BURN the PIECES. ↘

sentences.english: I don't relish the thought of killing another creature,
sentences.chinese: 我不喜欢杀害其他生物的想法
sentences.shadowing: I don't relish the thought‿of killing‿ANOTHER CREATURE, ↘

sentences.english: even a sadistic one like James.
sentences.chinese: 即使是嗜血成性的詹姆斯
sentences.shadowing: even‿a sadistic‿one LIKE JAMES. ↘

sentences.english: - What if he kills one of us first? - I'm gonna run Bella south.
sentences.chinese: 一要是他先杀了我们中的一个呢－我要带贝拉向南逃
sentences.shadowing: - What‿if he kills‿one of‿us first? - I'm gonna run BELLA SOUTH. ↘

sentences.english: Can you lead the tracker away from here?
sentences.chinese: 你能把猎手引开吗
sentences.shadowing: Can you lead the tracker‿AWAY from HERE? ↗

sentences.english: No, Edward. James knows you would never leave Bella.
sentences.chinese: 不行爱德华詹姆斯知道你不会离开贝拉的
sentences.shadowing: No / Edward. James knows you would never LEAVE BELLA. ↘

sentences.english: - He'll follow you. - I'll go with Bella.
sentences.chinese: -他会跟着你－我和贝拉一起走
sentences.shadowing: - He'll follow you. - I'LL go with BELLA. ↘

sentences.english: Jasper and I will drive her south.
sentences.chinese: 我和贾斯珀开车带她南下
sentences.shadowing: Jasper‿and‿I will DRIVE her SOUTH. ↘

sentences.english: I'll keep her safe, Edward.
sentences.chinese: 我保证她的安全爱德华
sentences.shadowing: I'll keep her SAFE / EDWARD. ↘

sentences.english: - Can you keep your thoughts to yourself? - Yes.
sentences.chinese: - 你能把自己的想法藏起来吗？ - 能。
sentences.shadowing: - Can you keep your thoughts to YOURSELF? - YES. ↘

sentences.english: Rosalie, Esme,
sentences.chinese: 罗莎莉埃斯米
sentences.shadowing: ROSALIE / ESME, ↘

sentences.english: could you put these on so the tracker will pick up Bella's scent?
sentences.chinese: 你们能穿上这个吗追踪者会跟着贝拉的气味
sentences.shadowing: could you put these on so the tracker will pick‿up BELLA'S SCENT? ↗

sentences.english: Why? What is she to me?
sentences.chinese: 凭什么她是我什么人
sentences.shadowing: WHY? WHAT is she to me? ↗

sentences.english: Rosalie, Bella is with Edward.
sentences.chinese: 罗莎莉贝拉和爱德华在一起的
sentences.shadowing: Rosalie / BELLA is with‿EDWARD. ↘

sentences.english: She's part of this family now,
sentences.chinese: 她现在是这个家的一员
sentences.shadowing: She's part‿of this FAMILY NOW, ↘

sentences.english: and we protect our family.
sentences.chinese: 我们要保护我们的家人
sentences.shadowing: and we PROTECT our FAMILY. ↘

sentences.english: Oh, God. If anything...
sentences.chinese: 天啊，如果发生什么……
sentences.shadowing: Oh / GOD. If‿ANYTHING... ↘

sentences.english: What if...
sentences.chinese: 如果
sentences.shadowing: WHAT if... ↘

sentences.english: If anything happens, I swear to God...
sentences.chinese: 如果有什么事情发生我会向上帝发誓
sentences.shadowing: If‿anything happens / I SWEAR to GOD... ↘

sentences.english: Nothing's gonna happen.
sentences.chinese: 不会有事的
sentences.shadowing: Nothing's GONNA HAPPEN. ↘

sentences.english: There's seven of us, and there's two of them,
sentences.chinese: 我们有七个人他们只有两个
sentences.shadowing: There's seven‿of‿us / and there's TWO of THEM, ↘

sentences.english: and when everything's done, I'm gonna come back and get you.
sentences.chinese: 事情一结束我就会回来接你
sentences.shadowing: and when‿everything's done / I'm gonna come BACK and GET you. ↘

sentences.english: Yeah.
sentences.chinese: 好
sentences.shadowing: YEAH. ↘

sentences.english: Bella, you are my life now.
sentences.chinese: 贝拉现在起你就是我的生命
sentences.shadowing: Bella / you are my LIFE NOW. ↘

sentences.english: Hey, Mom. It's me again.
sentences.chinese: 嘿妈妈还是我
sentences.shadowing: Hey / Mom. IT'S me AGAIN. ↘

sentences.english: You must have let your phone die or something.
sentences.chinese: 你的电话是挂了还是怎么的
sentences.shadowing: You must have let your phone DIE or SOMETHING. ↘

sentences.english: I'm not in Forks, but everything's okay, and I'll explain it later.
sentences.chinese: 我不在霍克斯了但是一切都好晚点我会跟你解释的
sentences.shadowing: I'm not‿in Forks / but‿everything's‿okay / and‿I'll‿EXPLAIN it LATER. ↘

sentences.english: Rosalie, mark the tree.
sentences.chinese: 罗莎莉在树上蹭一下
sentences.shadowing: Rosalie / MARK the TREE. ↘

sentences.english: That's good.
sentences.chinese: 好了
sentences.shadowing: THAT'S GOOD. ↘

sentences.english: What is it? What do you see?
sentences.chinese: 怎么了你看到了什么
sentences.shadowing: What‿is‿it? WHAT do you SEE? ↗

sentences.english: He's figured it out.
sentences.chinese: 他发现了
sentences.shadowing: He's FIGURED it‿OUT. ↘

sentences.english: The tracker, he just changed course.
sentences.chinese: 追踪者他刚刚改了路线
sentences.shadowing: The tracker / he just CHANGED COURSE. ↘

sentences.english: - Where will it take him, Alice? - Mirrors.
sentences.chinese: - 他要去哪里，爱丽丝？ - 镜子。
sentences.shadowing: - Where will‿it take him / ALICE? - MIRRORS. ↘

sentences.english: A room full of mirrors.
sentences.chinese: 一个房间的镜子
sentences.shadowing: A room FULL of MIRRORS. ↘

sentences.english: Edward said the visions weren't always certain.
sentences.chinese: 爱德华说视像不总是对的
sentences.shadowing: Edward said the visions weren't‿ALWAYS CERTAIN. ↘

sentences.english: She sees the course people are on while they're on it.
sentences.chinese: 她能看到人们正在走的那条道
sentences.shadowing: She sees the course people are on WHILE THEY'RE on‿it. ↘

sentences.english: If they change their minds, the vision changes.
sentences.chinese: 如果他们改变了想法视像就变了
sentences.shadowing: If they change their minds / the VISION CHANGES. ↘

sentences.english: Okay, so the course that the tracker's on now
sentences.chinese: 好那么追踪者正要去的地方
sentences.shadowing: Okay / so the course that the TRACKER'S on NOW ↘

sentences.english: is gonna lead him to a ballet studio?
sentences.chinese: 是一个芭蕾舞蹈房
sentences.shadowing: is gonna lead him to a BALLET STUDIO? ↗

sentences.english: - You've been here? - I took lessons as a kid.
sentences.chinese: -你去过这里－我小时候在那里上课
sentences.shadowing: - You've been here? - I took LESSONS as‿a KID. ↘

sentences.english: The school I went to had an arch just like that.
sentences.chinese: 那个学校有个那样的拱顶
sentences.shadowing: The school‿I went to had‿an‿arch JUST LIKE that. ↘

sentences.english: Was your school here in Phoenix?
sentences.chinese: 你的学校在凤凰城
sentences.shadowing: Was your school HERE in PHOENIX? ↗

sentences.english: Yeah.
sentences.chinese: 是的
sentences.shadowing: YEAH. ↘

sentences.english: - Edward, are you okay? - We've lost the tracker.
sentences.chinese: -爱德华你还好吗－我们跟丢了追踪者
sentences.shadowing: - Edward / are you okay? - We've LOST the TRACKER. ↘

sentences.english: The woman's still in the area.
sentences.chinese: 那个女的还在这附近
sentences.shadowing: The woman's STILL in the AREA. ↘

sentences.english: Rosalie and Esme are going back to Forks to protect your father.
sentences.chinese: 罗莎莉和埃斯米回霍克斯保护你爸爸
sentences.shadowing: Rosalie and‿Esme are going back to Forks to PROTECT your FATHER. ↘

sentences.english: I'm coming to get you. Then you and I are gonna go somewhere alone.
sentences.chinese: 我来接你然后我们单独去别的地方
sentences.shadowing: I'm coming to get you. Then you and‿I are gonna go SOMEWHERE ALONE. ↘

sentences.english: And the others will keep hunting.
sentences.chinese: 别的人去继续找
sentences.shadowing: And the others will KEEP HUNTING. ↘

sentences.english: I'll do whatever it takes to make you safe again.
sentences.chinese: 我无论如何要保护你的安全
sentences.shadowing: I'll do whatever‿it takes to make you SAFE AGAIN. ↘

sentences.english: Hey, Mom, I'm glad you got my message.
sentences.chinese: 嘿妈妈我很高兴你收到了我的信息
sentences.shadowing: Hey / Mom / I'm glad you GOT my MESSAGE. ↘

sentences.english: What are you doing home?
sentences.chinese: 你在家做什么
sentences.shadowing: What‿are you DOING HOME? ↗

sentences.english: Bella? Bella? Bella, where are you?
sentences.chinese: 贝拉贝拉你在什么地方
sentences.shadowing: Bella? Bella? BELLA / WHERE are you? ↗

sentences.english: - Calm down, everything's fine. - Bella? Bella?
sentences.chinese: -别激动我很好－贝拉贝拉
sentences.shadowing: - Calm down / everything's fine. - BELLA? BELLA? ↗

sentences.english: I'll explain everything later.
sentences.chinese: 我晚点会跟你解释的
sentences.shadowing: I'll‿explain‿EVERYTHING LATER. ↘

sentences.english: Mom, are you there?
sentences.chinese: 妈妈你在吗
sentences.shadowing: MOM / are you THERE? ↗

sentences.english: Forks High School doesn't protect its students' privacy very well.
sentences.chinese: 霍克斯高中不怎么保护学生的隐私
sentences.shadowing: Forks High School doesn't protect‿its students' privacy VERY WELL. ↘

sentences.english: It was just too easy for Victoria to find your previous address.
sentences.chinese: 维多利亚轻易地找到了你以前的住址
sentences.shadowing: It was just too easy for Victoria to find your PREVIOUS ADDRESS. ↘

sentences.english: It's a nice house you have here.
sentences.chinese: 你家的房子不错
sentences.shadowing: It's‿a nice HOUSE you have HERE. ↘

sentences.english: I was prepared to wait for you,
sentences.chinese: 我准备等你来
sentences.shadowing: I was PREPARED to WAIT for you, ↘

sentences.english: but then Mom came home after she received a very worried call from your dad,
sentences.chinese: 但是你妈妈回来了她接到了你爸的电话她很担心你
sentences.shadowing: but then Mom came home after she received‿a very worried CALL from your DAD, ↘

sentences.english: and it all worked out quite well.
sentences.chinese: 一切都进行得很顺利
sentences.shadowing: and‿it‿all worked‿out QUITE WELL. ↘

sentences.english: Wait, wait...
sentences.chinese: 等等……
sentences.shadowing: WAIT / WAIT... ↘

sentences.english: Don't touch her! Don't...
sentences.chinese: 不要碰她不要
sentences.shadowing: Don't TOUCH her! DON'T... ↘

sentences.english: - You can still save her. - Don't!
sentences.chinese: 你还可以救她－不要
sentences.shadowing: - You can still SAVE her. - DON'T! ↘

sentences.english: But you're gonna have to get away from your friends.
sentences.chinese: 但是你要离开你的朋友
sentences.shadowing: But you're gonna have to get‿AWAY from your FRIENDS. ↘

sentences.english: - Can you handle that? - Where should I meet you?
sentences.chinese: -你能办到吗－我去哪里找你
sentences.shadowing: - Can you handle that? - WHERE should‿I MEET you? ↗

sentences.english: How about your old ballet studio?
sentences.chinese: 你以前的芭蕾舞教室怎么样
sentences.shadowing: How‿about your‿old BALLET STUDIO? ↗

sentences.english: And I'll know if you bring anyone along.
sentences.chinese: 如果让我知道你带了什么人一起的话
sentences.shadowing: And‿I'll know‿if you bring‿ANYONE ALONG. ↘

sentences.english: Poor Mommy would pay the price for that mistake.
sentences.chinese: 你可怜的妈妈就要为这错误付出代价
sentences.shadowing: Poor Mommy would pay the PRICE for that MISTAKE. ↘

sentences.english: I'd never given much thought to how I would die.
sentences.chinese: 我从未多想我会怎样死去
sentences.shadowing: I'd never given much thought to HOW I would DIE. ↘

sentences.english: But dying in the place of someone I love seems like a good way to go.
sentences.chinese: 但为心爱的人而死似乎是个不错的方式
sentences.shadowing: But dying‿in the place of someone I love seems like a GOOD WAY to go. ↘

sentences.english: I can't bring myself to regret the decisions that brought me face-to-face with death.
sentences.chinese: 我不后悔当初的决定尽管我现在直面死亡
sentences.shadowing: I can't bring myself to regret the decisions that brought me face-to-FACE with DEATH. ↘

sentences.english: They also brought me to Edward.
sentences.chinese: 我也因此遇到了爱德华
sentences.shadowing: They‿also BROUGHT me to EDWARD. ↘
